prompt: A clean, minimal, modern 2D blank tile sprite for a mobile word puzzle game. Perfect square format. Rounded rectangle tile shape with a neutral white-to-light-gray color base (completely grayscaled and white so it can be tinted in Unity UI). Smooth satin-like matte surface. Subtle elegant soft drop shadow underneath. No text, no letters, no numbers. Centered composition, flat vector style, minimal design with very soft, subtle grayscaled gradients. Transparent background.
